intro.headline: Why talentsCARE?
intro.paragraph1: We support companies in not only attracting international professionals but also retaining them long-term. With practical onboarding programs, intercultural training, and nationwide mentoring, we create the foundation for sustainable integration, stable teams, and long-term business success.
intro.paragraph2: The skills shortage poses major challenges for many companies – especially regarding sustainable integration and long-term employee retention.

seminare.title: Seminars
seminare.shortDesc: Interactive seminars on intercultural competence and leading international teams.
seminare.longDesc: Our seminars provide practical knowledge for successful collaboration in diverse teams. Topics include intercultural communication, conflict management, and inclusive leadership.

schulungen.title: Training Courses
schulungen.shortDesc: Practice-oriented training for HR teams and leaders.
schulungen.longDesc: Intensive training programs to qualify your employees in working with international colleagues and applicants.

workshops.shortDesc: Intensive workshops for developing integration strategies.
workshops.longDesc: In our workshops, we work together to develop customized solutions for your specific challenges.

vortraege.title: Lectures
vortraege.shortDesc: Inspiring lectures on diversity and integration.
vortraege.longDesc: Our experts deliver lectures at conferences, corporate events, and professional symposia.

webinare.title: Webinars
webinare.longDesc: Digital learning formats enable location-independent professional development on relevant integration topics.

coaching.title: Coaching
coaching.longDesc: Personal guidance in developing intercultural leadership competencies.

training.title: Training
training.longDesc: Hands-on training for direct application of intercultural competencies in professional life.

mentoring.longDesc: Structured mentoring programs to promote intercultural collaboration.

hero.headline: Services for Employers
hero.description: Successful integration starts with the right strategy. We support you in recruiting, integrating, and retaining international professionals.

employers.tagline: Recruitment is only the first step – true talent acquisition means sustainable integration

recruiting.title: Recruitment Consulting
recruiting.audience: Target Audience: Companies with open positions for professionals and trainees from third countries
recruiting.description: We find professionals and trainees from third countries who fit your company both professionally and personally. Our consulting includes needs analysis, job profile creation, and matching with pre-qualified candidates from the VIETconsult network.

onboarding.title: Onboarding Programs
onboarding.audience: Target Audience: New international employees, their teams, and managers
onboarding.description: We design the start systematically – for talents, teams, and managers. Structured onboarding reduces onboarding time and increases commitment from day one.

training.title: Intercultural Training
training.audience: Target Audience: Teams, departments, and managers working with international colleagues
training.description: We train teams and managers to improve collaboration and communication. Diversity becomes strength – misunderstandings are avoided, collaboration strengthened.

mentoring.title: Mentoring Programs
mentoring.audience: Target Audience: Companies wanting to build a structured mentoring system
mentoring.description: A proven tool for sustainable integration. Mentoring builds trust and contributes to long-term talent retention.

retention.title: Talent Retention
retention.audience: Target Audience: Companies with existing international employees
retention.description: We develop strategies so talents not only stay but also develop professionally and personally.

cooperation.title: Strong Cooperation
cooperation.audience: Target Audience: Authorities, chambers, educational institutions, and companies
cooperation.description: We handle coordination with authorities, chambers, and institutions and design practical formats together.

intro.headline: Your Journey to Germany
intro.description: We accompany international professionals on their way to Germany – from preparation in the home country to successful integration in work and daily life. With practical training, individual support, and nationwide mentoring, we create the foundation for a secure start, personal development, and long-term success.

seminare.title: Seminars
seminare.shortDesc: Seminars on German work culture and career entry.
seminare.longDesc: Learn about the specifics of the German labor market and optimally prepare for your career.

schulungen.title: Training Courses
schulungen.longDesc: Expand your professional qualifications and improve your German language skills.

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.shortDesc: Practical workshops on applications and career planning.
workshops.longDesc: In interactive workshops, you practice job interviews and develop your career strategy.

vortraege.title: Lectures

vortraege.longDesc: Gain valuable insights into the German labor market and German culture.

webinare.longDesc: Conveniently participate in our online offerings from home or on the go.

coaching.title: Coaching
coaching.longDesc: Individual support in career planning and personal development in Germany.

training.shortDesc: Soft-skill training for the German labor market.
training.longDesc: Develop the soft skills that are in demand in German companies.

mentoring.longDesc: Benefit from the experience of successful professionals who have already walked your path.
mentoring.targetAudience: International Talents at All Career Levels

events.longDesc: Build your professional network and get to know German culture.

cta.headline: Start Your Career in Germany
cta.description: Let's shape your success path together.

talents.tagline: Our Goal: You should feel not only professionally but also personally safe, understood, and welcome

phase1.title: Preparation in Home Country
phase1.description: Together with our cooperation partners on site (VIETconsult / HDEU Vietnam), we optimally prepare talents for their start in Germany.

phase2.title: Support for Starting in Germany
phase2.description: We offer not mere accompaniment, but real support for settling in.

phase3.title: Professional Support
phase3.description: Many companies limit themselves to professional onboarding – we deliberately go further.

phase4.title: Personal Development
phase4.description: We support talents as whole people – not just as professionals.
items: Building professional networks: Events, industry meetings, alumni network
Building private networks: Sports clubs, cultural groups, neighborhood initiatives
Coaching for independence: Self-confidence, personal responsibility, decision-making ability
Language development: Beyond B2, technical language, understanding dialects
Career planning: What next steps are possible? Further education, advancement, specialization

phase5.title: Mentoring
phase5.description: Our mentoring programs accompany talents individually throughout the entire integration process.
items: Personal support by experienced mentors (1:1)
Orientation in professional and daily life
Support in building professional and social networks
Regular meetings (at least 2x monthly)
Joint goal setting and progress monitoring

phase6.title: Digital Support & Learning Platforms
phase6.description: We also support talents digitally to enable continuous learning and networking.
items: Online learning platforms: Professional and language education (asynchronous)
Virtual networks: Exchange with other talents nationwide
Digital everyday aids: Apps and tools for authorities, housing, health
Live webinars: Monthly topic evenings on relevant integration questions
Success stories: Platform for sharing experiences and inspiration

hero.headline: We Ensure Your Talents Stay
hero.description: Talent acquisition doesn't end with hiring new employees. It truly succeeds when international professionals are culturally integrated, identify with the company long-term, actively contribute, and want to stay.

history.headline: Our Story
history.paragraph1: talentsCARE was founded as the integration arm of VIETconsult Group to fill a market gap: While many agencies focus on recruitment, their work often ends with arrival. talentsCARE picks up exactly where others stop – at sustainable integration.
history.paragraph2: For over 10 years, we have been accompanying companies and professionals on their path to successful collaboration. Our experience shows: Only when talents feel welcome do they stay long-term.

philosophy.headline: Our Philosophy
philosophy.paragraph1: Sustainable talent acquisition means not only winning people but also permanently engaging and integrating them. Hiring is only the first step.
philosophy.paragraph2: We believe in the power of encounter. Integration succeeds when people get to know, understand, and respect each other. That's why we create spaces for exchange – in the company, in the neighborhood, in society.

partners.description: talentsCARE works as a network partner with a broad spectrum of institutions:

items.title: Recommended by IHK Frankfurt and IHK Hannover

mission.headline: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: We believe in a work world where diversity is seen as strength and cultural differences are experienced as enrichment. Our mission is to build bridges between companies and international talents.
mission.paragraph2: With passion, expertise, and a deep understanding of intercultural dynamics, we accompany both sides on their common path to success. We create spaces for encounter, foster understanding, and develop sustainable solutions for the challenges of a globalized work world.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Long-term solutions instead of short-term success – we think in generations, not quarters.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.description: Ethical recruiting according to WHO, ILO, and KDA standards – Employer-Pays principle without costs for professionals.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We work at eye level with companies, talents, and institutions.

integration.title: Integration
integration.description: Successful collaboration arises through mutual understanding and cultural sensitivity.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Highest standards in consulting, training, and support – certified and continuously improved.

approach.headline: Our Approach
approach.description: We combine solid expertise with practical experience and a holistic view of integration and collaboration.

step1.title: Analysis & Understanding
step1.description: We listen and analyze your specific situation and challenges.

step2.title: Concept & Strategy
step2.description: We develop tailored solutions that fit your goals and resources.

step3.title: Implementation & Support
step3.description: We stay by your side and ensure sustainable results.

section1.title: 1. Privacy at a Glance
section1.content: The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website. Personal data is any data with which you can be personally identified.

section2.title: 2. Data Collection on This Website
section2.content: Data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator. Their contact details can be found in the imprint of this website. Your data is collected partly by you communicating it to us, for example through entries in a contact form.

section3.title: 3. Analysis Tools and Third-Party Tools
section3.content: When visiting this website, your surfing behavior can be statistically evaluated. This is done primarily with so-called analysis programs. Detailed information about these analysis programs can be found in the following sections of this privacy policy.

section4.title: 4. Your Rights
section4.content: You have the right to receive information about the origin, recipient, and purpose of your stored personal data at any time. You also have a right to request the correction or deletion of this data.

section5.title: 5. Contact
section5.content: If you have any questions about data protection, you can contact us at any time. The contact details can be found in the imprint of this website.

responsible.title: Responsible for Content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV
responsible.name: Dr. Maria Schmidt

section1.title: 1. Scope
section1.content: These General Terms and Conditions (GTC) apply to all contracts between talentsCARE GmbH and its clients for the provision of consulting and training services.

section2.title: 2. Contract Conclusion
section2.content: The contract is concluded by the client's acceptance of the offer. Acceptance can be made in writing, orally, or through implied action.

section3.title: 3. Scope of Services
section3.content: The scope of services to be provided is defined in the respective offer or service description. Changes to the scope of services require written agreement.

section4.title: 4. Remuneration and Payment Terms
section4.content: Remuneration is based on the currently valid price list. Invoices are due for payment within 14 days of the invoice date without deduction.

section5.title: 5. Liability
section5.content: We are fully liable for intent and gross negligence. In case of slight negligence, we are only liable for breach of essential contractual obligations.
